meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats B — Blueberry + Almond Butter
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press blueberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set and golden. Top with almond butter.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Mexican Chicken Taco Bowl
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with cumin, chili powder, and salt, then sear in olive oil 5-6 minutes per side. Rest and slice. Saute pepper, onion, garlic, and corn 3-4 minutes. Warm black beans and cauliflower rice separately. Assemble bowl with cauli rice, beans, chicken, sauteed veggies, salsa, avocado, cilantro, and lime.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Brownie Bites
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder and cocoa powder in a small bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, vanilla, and salt, stirring until a thick dough forms. Roll into 2-3 small balls and refrigerate 15 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately as dough bites. Optionally bake at 180C/350F for 10-12 minutes for a cakey texture.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Veggie Omelet + Turkey Sausage + Black Beans
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute onion and bell pepper 3-4 minutes until softened, add spinach and stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through 2 minutes. Push everything aside, whisk egg whites and whole egg together, pour into the pan and cook as an omelet or scramble-style. Serve with warmed black beans, salsa, avocado, and flaxseed sprinkled on top.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Southern Smothered Turkey with Collard Greens
meals.instructions: Season turkey with smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper, then sear in half the olive oil 4-5 minutes per side and remove. Saute onion and garlic in remaining oil 3 minutes, add collard greens, vinegar, and broth, cover and cook 8-10 minutes until tender. Cube sweet potato and roast at 220C/425F for 20 minutes. Warm black-eyed peas and plate turkey over greens, topped with diced tomato, alongside sweet potato and peas.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Banana Nice Cream
meals.instructions: Blend frozen banana slices with protein powder in a food processor or high-powered blender until smooth and creamy, about 2-3 minutes, scraping sides as needed. Add cocoa powder, honey, and vanilla, then blend until combined. Scoop into a bowl and eat immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 20 minutes for a firmer consistency.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats A — Raspberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set and golden. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water and drizzle honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Indian Chicken Lentil Dal
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with turmeric, garam masala, and salt, then sear in half the coconut oil 5-6 minutes and set aside. Rinse lentils and simmer in 150ml water 15-18 minutes until soft. Toss cauliflower with remaining oil and turmeric, roast at 220C/425F for 20 minutes. Saute onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, and coriander, add tomato, cooked lentils, coconut milk, and spinach, simmer 5 minutes, then stir in chicken. Finish with lemon juice, flaxseed, and serve topped with cauliflower and cilantro.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Mug Cake
meals.instructions: Mix all dry ingredients (protein powder, oat flour, cocoa, baking powder, cinnamon) in a microwave-safe mug. Add egg white, almond milk, honey, and vanilla, then stir until smooth. Microwave 60-90 seconds until set. Alternatively, bake in a ramekin at 180C/350F for 12-15 minutes.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Scrambled Eggs + Sauteed Greens + Beans
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute mushrooms 3-4 minutes until golden, add garlic and cook 30 seconds, then add kale and stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through 1-2 minutes. Push everything to one side, scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other side, and season with cumin, smoked paprika, and salt. Serve with warmed black beans, avocado, and flaxseed on top.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Greek Chicken Souvlaki Bowl
meals.instructions: Marinate diced chicken in olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper for 10+ minutes. Simmer dried lentils in 180ml water 18-20 minutes until tender, then drain. Sear chicken in a hot skillet 5-6 minutes per side. Mix yogurt with a bit of diced cucumber, dill, and a squeeze of lemon for tzatziki. Assemble bowl with lentils, chicken, cucumber, tomato, red onion, olives, tzatziki drizzle, and flaxseed and chia seeds on top.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Cookie
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder, oat flour, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, and vanilla, mixing until a thick dough forms. Shape into 1-2 flat cookies on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake at 180C/350F for 10-12 minutes until edges are golden. Let cool 5 minutes to firm up.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats D — Chocolate Strawberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, cocoa powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press strawberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water and drizzle honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Cajun Shrimp with Black Beans
meals.instructions: Season shrimp with Cajun seasoning, smoked paprika, and salt. Heat half the olive oil in a large skillet, sear shrimp 2 minutes per side and remove. Add remaining oil, saute onion, celery, and pepper 3 minutes, then add garlic, okra, and cook 3 more minutes. Add tomato and black beans, cook 2 minutes, then return shrimp. Serve over cauliflower rice with hot sauce, lemon, and avocado.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Baked Cinnamon Apples with Protein Dip

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in dip)

meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 190C/375F. Core and slice apple, toss with melted coconut oil, honey, and cinnamon, then spread in a single layer and bake 15-20 minutes until soft and golden at edges. Mix Greek yogurt with protein powder until smooth for the dip. Serve warm apples with protein yogurt dip on the side.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Breakfast Burrito (Corn Tortilla)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute bell pepper and onion 2-3 minutes, add sliced turkey sausage and cook 2 minutes. Push filling to one side, scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other. Warm corn tortillas directly on a burner 30 seconds per side, warm black beans separately. Assemble with eggs, sausage, peppers, beans, salsa, avocado, cilantro, flaxseed, and hot sauce.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Thai Basil Chicken Stir-Fry
meals.instructions: Slice chicken thin and heat coconut oil in a wok or skillet over high heat. Stir-fry chicken 4-5 minutes, remove, then add garlic, ginger, and chili for 30 seconds. Add pepper and snap peas, stir-fry 2 minutes. Return chicken, add coconut aminos, fish sauce, and sesame oil, then toss with Thai basil until wilted. Steam edamame separately. Serve over cauliflower rice with lime and flaxseed sprinkled on top.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Energy Balls
meals.instructions: Mash the date in a small bowl with a fork until paste-like (soak in warm water 5 minutes first if dry). Add protein powder, cocoa powder, and almond butter, mixing until combined. Roll into 2-3 small balls, then roll in coconut flakes to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately. No baking needed.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats C — Chocolate Raspberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, cocoa powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Spanish Chicken & White Bean Stew
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with paprika, cumin, and salt, then sear in olive oil 5-6 minutes and remove. Saute onion, pepper, and garlic 3 minutes. Add broth, tomato, sweet potato, and bay leaf, return chicken, and simmer 15 minutes covered. Add white beans last 5 minutes. Remove bay leaf and finish with lemon juice, flaxseed, and parsley.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Date + Nut Butter Bites
meals.instructions: Slice dates lengthwise and remove pit if needed. Mix almond butter with protein powder until a thick paste forms, adding a few drops of water if needed. Stuff each date with the protein-almond butter filling and press closed. Mix cocoa powder and coconut flakes on a small plate and roll stuffed dates to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Scrambled Eggs + Sauteed Greens + Beans
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute mushrooms 3-4 minutes until golden, add garlic and cook 30 seconds, then add kale and stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through 1-2 minutes. Push everything to one side, scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other side, and season with cumin, smoked paprika, and salt. Serve with warmed black beans, avocado, and flaxseed on top.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
meals.instructions: Mix teriyaki glaze: coconut aminos, honey, ginger, and garlic. Pat salmon dry and season with salt. Sear skin-side down 3 minutes, flip, brush with glaze, and cook 3-4 more minutes. Steam broccoli and edamame, warm cauliflower rice. Bowl: cauli rice, glazed salmon, broccoli, edamame, flaxseed. Drizzle remaining glaze and top with sesame seeds and green onion.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Brownie Bites
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder and cocoa powder in a small bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, vanilla, and salt, stirring until a thick dough forms. Roll into 2-3 small balls and refrigerate 15 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately as dough bites. Optionally bake at 180C/350F for 10-12 minutes for a cakey texture.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats A — Raspberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set and golden. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water and drizzle honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Indian Chicken Chana Masala
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with garam masala, turmeric, and salt, then sear in coconut oil 5-6 minutes and remove. Saute onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, and chili powder until fragrant. Add tomato and cook 4 minutes, then add chickpeas with 60ml water and simmer 10 minutes. Return chicken, stir in coconut milk and spinach. Finish with lemon juice and flaxseed, serve over cauliflower rice with cilantro.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Banana Nice Cream
meals.instructions: Blend frozen banana slices with protein powder in a food processor or high-powered blender until smooth and creamy, about 2-3 minutes, scraping sides as needed. Add cocoa powder, honey, and vanilla, then blend until combined. Scoop into a bowl and eat immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 20 minutes for a firmer consistency.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats C — Chocolate Raspberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, cocoa powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Lebanese Chicken Shawarma Bowl
meals.instructions: Mix cumin, coriander, turmeric, paprika, and cinnamon with olive oil and garlic into a paste, coat chicken and marinate 10+ minutes. Bake at 220C/425F for 20-25 minutes until 74C internal, then rest and slice thin. Simmer lentils in 180ml water 18-20 minutes until tender. Mix yogurt with lemon juice and a pinch of salt for sauce. Bowl: lentils, sliced chicken, cucumber, tomato, red onion, parsley, flaxseed, chia seeds, and yogurt sauce drizzle.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Mug Cake
meals.instructions: Mix all dry ingredients (protein powder, oat flour, cocoa, baking powder, cinnamon) in a microwave-safe mug. Add egg white, almond milk, honey, and vanilla, then stir until smooth. Microwave 60-90 seconds until set. Alternatively, bake in a ramekin at 180C/350F for 12-15 minutes.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: GF Protein Waffles (Buckwheat + Flax)
meals.instructions: Make flax egg by mixing 7g ground flaxseed with 21g water and letting it sit 5 minutes. Mix oat flour, buckwheat flour, protein powder, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a bowl. In another bowl, mash banana, add egg, flax egg, and almond milk, then whisk. Combine wet and dry, let sit 2 minutes. Grease waffle iron with coconut oil, pour batter in and cook 4-5 minutes. Top with sliced strawberries, peanut butter, and honey drizzle.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Italian Turkey Breast Meatballs with Zucchini
meals.instructions: Mix ground turkey breast with diced onion, egg white, oat flour, half the Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper, then form into 5-6 small meatballs. Bake at 200C/400F for 18-20 minutes. Meanwhile, heat olive oil, saute garlic 30 seconds, add tomato sauce, remaining Italian seasoning, and red pepper flakes, simmering 5 minutes. Add white beans and heat through. Saute or spiralize zucchini. Plate zucchini with meatballs, sauce and beans, flaxseed, and torn basil.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Baked Cinnamon Apples with Protein Dip

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in dip)

meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 190C/375F. Core and slice apple, toss with melted coconut oil, honey, and cinnamon, then spread in a single layer and bake 15-20 minutes until soft and golden at edges. Mix Greek yogurt with protein powder until smooth for the dip. Serve warm apples with protein yogurt dip on the side.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats D — Chocolate Strawberry + PB Fit
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, cocoa powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press strawberries into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water and drizzle honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: American Turkey Burger Plate
meals.instructions: Mix ground turkey breast with diced onion, garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, then form into a thick patty. Sear in olive oil 5-6 minutes per side. Cube sweet potato, roast at 220C/425F for 20 minutes. Saute kale 3-4 minutes with a pinch of salt. Warm black beans. Plate patty on lettuce with tomato, mustard, and pickle, with sweet potato, kale, beans, and flaxseed on the side.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Cookie
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder, oat flour, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, and vanilla, mixing until a thick dough forms. Shape into 1-2 flat cookies on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake at 180C/350F for 10-12 minutes until edges are golden. Let cool 5 minutes to firm up.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Overnight Oats + Chia + Whey Isolate
meals.instructions: The night before, combine oats, protein powder, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar or container. Add almond milk and yogurt, stir well, and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours). In the morning, stir and top with raspberries and peanut butter, then drizzle honey. Eat cold or microwave 1-2 minutes if you prefer warm. No cooking required.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Southwestern Chicken Enchilada Bowl
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with cumin, chili powder, and salt. Sear in olive oil 5-6 minutes, then add garlic, pepper, and onion and cook 3 minutes. Add tomato sauce and black beans, simmering 5 minutes. Warm cauliflower rice. Bowl: cauli rice, enchilada chicken and beans, avocado, flaxseed, lime, cilantro, and green onion.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Date + Nut Butter Bites
meals.instructions: Slice dates lengthwise and remove pit if needed. Mix almond butter with protein powder until a thick paste forms, adding a few drops of water if needed. Stuff each date with the protein-almond butter filling and press closed. Mix cocoa powder and coconut flakes on a small plate and roll stuffed dates to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Baked Oats G — Apple + Walnut
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, add egg and whisk. Stir in protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth, then fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press diced apple into the top, and bake 25-30 minutes until set and golden. Top with chopped walnuts and drizzle honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Polish Chicken Hunter's Stew
meals.instructions: Dice chicken breast and brown in a pot 4 minutes, then remove. Saute onion and carrot 4 minutes, add garlic, paprika, and caraway for 1 minute. Add cabbage, sauerkraut, tomato, potato, broth, and bay leaf, return chicken, and simmer covered 25-30 minutes. Add beans last 5 minutes, remove bay leaf. Stir in flaxseed and serve in a bowl garnished with fresh dill.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Energy Balls
meals.instructions: Mash the date in a small bowl with a fork until paste-like (soak in warm water 5 minutes first if dry). Add protein powder, cocoa powder, and almond butter, mixing until combined. Roll into 2-3 small balls, then roll in coconut flakes to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately. No baking needed.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Chocolate Raspberry Baked Oats (Topping C)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, cocoa powder, vanilla, cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes until set and golden. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water as a drizzle.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Turkish Lamb Kebab with Lentil Pilaf
meals.instructions: Cube lamb, toss with garlic, cumin, paprika, sumac, red pepper flakes, salt, and half the olive oil. Spread on a baking sheet and bake at 220C/425F for 15–18 minutes. Cook lentils by simmering in 170ml water with a pinch of cumin for 18–20 minutes, then stir in sauteed onion and diced tomato. Roast peppers alongside lamb. Make yogurt sauce by mixing yogurt with lemon juice and a pinch of salt. Plate lentil pilaf with lamb, roasted peppers, yogurt drizzle, flaxseed, chia seeds, and parsley.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Brownie Bites
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder and cocoa powder in a small bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, vanilla, and salt — stir until a thick dough forms. Roll into 2–3 small balls. Refrigerate 15 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately as dough bites.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Veggie Omelet with Turkey Sausage & Black Beans
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute onion and bell pepper 3–4 minutes until softened, add spinach and stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through 2 minutes. Whisk egg whites and whole egg, pour over vegetables, and cook as an omelet or scramble-style. Serve with warmed black beans, salsa, avocado, and flaxseed sprinkled on top.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Dominican Pollo Guisado
meals.instructions: Cut chicken into chunks and season with oregano, cumin, salt, and vinegar. Heat olive oil and brown chicken 4 minutes per side, then remove. Saute onion, pepper, and garlic 3 minutes, add tomato, tomato paste, and 60ml water. Return chicken, cover, and braise 20–25 minutes until tender. Add pigeon peas for the last 5 minutes. Serve over warm cauliflower rice with avocado, cilantro, flaxseed, and lime.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Banana Nice Cream with Cocoa
meals.instructions: Blend frozen banana slices with protein powder in a food processor until smooth and creamy, about 2–3 minutes, scraping the sides. Add cocoa powder, honey, and vanilla, then blend until combined. Scoop into a bowl and eat immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 20 minutes for a firmer consistency.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Raspberry & PB Fit Baked Oats (Topping A)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes until set and golden. Top with PB fit powder mixed with a splash of water, and drizzle with honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Taiwanese Five-Spice Ground Turkey (Lu Rou Fan-Inspired)
meals.instructions: Heat sesame oil and brown ground turkey 5–6 minutes, breaking apart. Add onion, garlic, and ginger — cook 2 minutes. Stir in five-spice, white pepper, coconut aminos, honey, and rice vinegar, then simmer 5 minutes. Microwave or roast diced sweet potato until tender. Steam bok choy and edamame separately, and warm cauliflower rice. Bowl: cauliflower rice, five-spice turkey, sweet potato, bok choy, edamame, flaxseed, and green onion.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Mug Cake
meals.instructions: Mix all dry ingredients in a microwave-safe mug: protein powder, oat flour, cocoa, baking powder, cinnamon. Add egg white, almond milk, honey, and vanilla — stir until smooth. Microwave 60–90 seconds until set (it will puff up then settle). Alternatively, bake in a ramekin at 180C/350F for 12–15 minutes.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Breakfast Burrito (Corn Tortilla)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute bell pepper and onion 2–3 minutes, add sliced turkey sausage and cook 2 minutes. Push filling to one side and scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other side. Warm corn tortillas directly on a burner 30 seconds per side. Warm black beans separately. Assemble: tortilla, eggs, sausage, peppers, beans, salsa, avocado, cilantro, flaxseed, and hot sauce.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: French Chicken & Lentil Soup
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with herbes de Provence and salt. Sear in half the olive oil 5–6 minutes, then remove. Saute onion, carrot, and celery 5 minutes (mirepoix). Add garlic and thyme for 1 minute. Add lentils, broth, tomato, and bay leaf — bring to a boil, reduce, and simmer 25–30 minutes. Return chicken for the last 5 minutes. Stir in spinach, mustard, lemon juice, and flaxseed. Remove bay leaf before serving.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Cookie
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder, oat flour, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, and vanilla — mix until a thick dough forms. Shape into 1–2 flat cookies on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Bake at 180C/350F for 10–12 minutes until edges are golden. Let cool 5 minutes — they firm up as they cool.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Scrambled Eggs with Sauteed Greens & Beans
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute mushrooms 3–4 minutes until golden, add garlic for 30 seconds, then add kale and stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through 1–2 minutes. Push everything to one side and scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other side. Season with cumin, smoked paprika, and salt. Serve with warmed black beans, avocado, and flaxseed on top.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Tex-Mex Chicken Chili
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with cumin, chili powder, and salt. Sear in olive oil 5–6 minutes, then remove. Saute onion, pepper, and garlic 3 minutes. Add tomato, salsa, broth, and black beans, then return chicken. Simmer covered 15–18 minutes until chicken is cooked through and flavors meld into a thick chili. Stir in flaxseed and serve topped with avocado, cilantro, lime, and hot sauce.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Baked Cinnamon Apples with Protein Yogurt Dip

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in dip)

meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 190C/375F. Core and slice apple, toss with melted coconut oil, honey, and cinnamon, then spread in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake 15–20 minutes until soft and golden at the edges. For the dip, mix Greek yogurt with protein powder until smooth. Serve warm apples with the protein yogurt dip on the side.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Pumpkin & Pecan Baked Oats (Topping E)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Spread pumpkin puree on top of the batter in a greased ramekin. Bake 25–30 minutes until set and golden. Top with chopped pecans and a drizzle of honey.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Portuguese Garlic Shrimp (Camarões com Alho)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil and butter in a skillet. Add garlic slices and cook 1 minute until fragrant but not brown. Add shrimp, paprika, pepper flakes, and bay leaf — sear 2 minutes per side. Add vinegar and lemon juice, let reduce 1 minute, then remove bay leaf. Separately, warm white beans with diced tomato and a splash of water, and saute kale 3–4 minutes. Plate beans and kale, top with garlic shrimp and all the pan sauce, then finish with flaxseed, chia seeds, and parsley.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Energy Balls
meals.instructions: If the date is dry, soak in warm water 5 minutes and drain. Mash the date in a small bowl with a fork until paste-like. Add protein powder, cocoa powder, and almond butter — mix until combined. Roll into 2–3 small balls, then roll in coconut flakes to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Mixed Berry & Sunflower Seed Butter Baked Oats (Topping D, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press mixed berries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes until set. Top with sunflower seed butter.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: BBQ Pulled Chicken Bowl
meals.instructions: Make BBQ sauce by mixing tomato paste, honey, vinegar, coconut aminos, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder. Place chicken in an Instant Pot with sauce and 60ml water — pressure cook 12 minutes with natural release 5 minutes, then shred and toss in sauce. Mix shredded cabbage and carrot with yogurt, lime, and salt for a quick slaw. Warm black-eyed peas. Bowl: peas, pulled chicken, slaw, flaxseed, and olive oil drizzle.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Italian Chicken & White Bean with Kale
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with Italian seasoning, salt, and red pepper flakes. Sear in olive oil 5 minutes, remove. Saute garlic 30 seconds, add broth, tomato, and kale. Return chicken, simmer 8-10 minutes. Add white beans last 3 minutes. Finish with lemon juice and flaxseed.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Date & Nut Butter Stuffed Bites

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in filling)

meals.instructions: Slice dates lengthwise and remove pit if needed. Mix almond butter with protein powder until a thick paste forms — add a few drops of water if needed. Stuff each date with the filling and press closed. Mix cocoa powder and coconut flakes on a plate, then roll stuffed dates in the mixture to coat. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Raspberry & Peanut Butter Baked Oats (Topping A, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press raspberries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes until set. Top with peanut butter.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Indian Chicken & Red Lentil Dal
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with garam masala and turmeric. Sear in coconut oil 5 minutes, then remove. Simmer red lentils in water 15–18 minutes until soft. Saute onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, and remaining spices, then combine with lentils, diced tomato, and coconut milk. Return chicken and stir in spinach. Serve over cauliflower rice with flaxseed and lemon juice.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Mexican Chicken Taco Bowl
meals.instructions: Season diced chicken with cumin, chili powder, and salt. Sear in olive oil 5–6 minutes, then remove. Saute garlic and bell pepper, warm black beans, and heat cauliflower rice. Assemble bowl: cauliflower rice, seasoned chicken, black beans, salsa, avocado, cilantro, flaxseed, and lime.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Brownie Bites (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder and cocoa powder in a small bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, vanilla, and salt — stir until a thick dough forms. Roll into 2–3 small balls. Refrigerate 15 minutes to firm up, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Scrambled Eggs with Greens & Beans (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute mushrooms 3–4 minutes, add garlic, then kale — stir until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat through. Push everything to one side and scramble egg whites and whole egg on the other. Season with cumin, smoked paprika, and salt. Serve with warmed black beans, avocado, and flaxseed.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Greek Chicken & Chickpea Spinach Stew
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with oregano, cumin, and salt. Sear in olive oil 5 minutes, then remove. Saute onion and garlic, add chickpeas, tomato, and 60ml water — simmer 10 minutes. Return chicken and stir in spinach until wilted. Finish with lemon juice and flaxseed.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Hungarian Turkey Paprikash
meals.instructions: Dice turkey and brown in olive oil 4 minutes. Add onion and pepper — cook 3 minutes. Add garlic, generous paprika, and caraway — stir 1 minute. Add tomato, broth, and sweet potato, then simmer 15 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt (don't boil after adding). Steam cauliflower until tender. Serve paprikash over cauliflower with flaxseed.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Banana Nice Cream (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Blend frozen banana slices with protein powder in a food processor until smooth and creamy. Add cocoa powder, honey, and vanilla — blend until combined. Scoop into a bowl and eat immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 20 minutes for a firmer consistency.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Strawberry & Tahini Baked Oats (Topping C, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press strawberries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes until set. Drizzle with tahini.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: New England Turkey & White Bean Chowder
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil and saute onion, celery, and carrot 4 minutes. Add garlic and thyme for 1 minute. Add diced turkey breast and cook 3 minutes. Pour in broth and add bay leaf — simmer 15 minutes. Add white beans and coconut milk, simmer 5 more minutes. Remove bay leaf. Lightly mash some beans against the pot for thickness. Season with lemon, salt, and pepper.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Lebanese Chicken & Chickpea Stew (Fatteh-Inspired)
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with cumin and turmeric. Sear in olive oil 5 minutes, then remove. Saute onion and carrot 3 minutes, add garlic and spices. Add tomato, broth, and chickpeas — simmer 12–15 minutes. Return chicken for the last 5 minutes. Finish with lemon juice, flaxseed, and cilantro. Serve as a hearty stew.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Mug Cake (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder, oat flour, cocoa powder, cinnamon, and baking powder in a microwave-safe mug. Add egg white, almond milk, honey, and vanilla — stir until smooth. Microwave 60–90 seconds until set. Alternatively, bake in a ramekin at 180C/350F for 12–15 minutes.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: GF Protein Waffles (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Make flax egg: mix 7g ground flaxseed with 21g water and let sit 5 minutes. Preheat waffle iron and grease with coconut oil. Mix flours, protein powder, chia seeds, and cinnamon. Mash banana, add egg, flax egg, and almond milk — whisk. Combine wet and dry, let sit 2 minutes. Pour into waffle iron and cook 4–5 minutes. Top with strawberries, peanut butter, and honey drizzle.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Tuscan Turkey Sausage, White Bean & Egg Skillet
meals.instructions: Sear diced chicken breast in olive oil 5 minutes, then add sliced turkey sausage and cook 2 minutes. Add garlic, kale, Italian seasoning, and pepper flakes — cook 2 minutes. Add beans, tomato, and simmer 3 minutes. Make a well, crack egg in, cover and cook 5 minutes. Finish with lemon juice and flaxseed.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Japanese Chicken Yakitori with Edamame
meals.instructions: Make yakitori glaze: mix coconut aminos, honey, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger. Cut chicken into chunks, brush with glaze, and bake at 200C/400F for 15–18 minutes, brushing with more glaze halfway through. Steam broccoli and edamame, and warm cauliflower rice. Serve with sesame oil drizzle, sesame seeds, green onion, flaxseed, and chia seeds.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Cookie (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder, oat flour, cinnamon, and salt. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, and vanilla — mix into a thick dough. Shape into 1–2 flat cookies on parchment. Bake at 180C/350F for 10–12 minutes until edges are golden. Let cool 5 minutes to firm.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Mixed Berry & Sunflower Butter Baked Oats (Topping D, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, then add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press mixed berries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes. Top with sunflower seed butter.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Cuban Turkey Sausage, Black Beans & Fried Egg
meals.instructions: Heat half the olive oil and fry plantain slices 2 minutes per side until golden — remove. Sear diced chicken breast 5 minutes, add sliced turkey sausage and cook 2 minutes. Saute onion, garlic, cumin, and oregano. Add black beans with 30ml water and mash slightly, simmering 5 minutes. Fry egg in remaining oil. Plate: beans, chicken, sausage, fried egg, plantain, flaxseed, lime, and cilantro.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Korean Turkey Bulgogi Bowl
meals.instructions: Mix coconut aminos, gochujang, honey, garlic, and ginger for the sauce. Brown ground turkey in sesame oil 5–6 minutes, add sauce and cook 2 minutes until glazed. Steam bok choy and edamame. Warm cauliflower rice. Bowl: cauliflower rice, bulgogi turkey, bok choy, carrot, kimchi, edamame, flaxseed, sesame seeds, and green onion.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Baked Cinnamon Apples with Protein Dip (Phase 2)

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in dip)

meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 190C/375F. Slice apple, toss with melted coconut oil, honey, and cinnamon, spread in a single layer and bake 15–20 minutes until soft and golden. Mix Greek yogurt with protein powder for the dip. Serve warm apples with dip on the side.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Overnight Oats with Chia & Whey Isolate (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: The night before, combine oats, protein powder, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar. Add almond milk and yogurt, stir well, and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours). In the morning, stir, then top with raspberries, peanut butter, and a drizzle of honey. Eat cold or microwave 1–2 minutes if you prefer warm.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Pacific NW Pan-Seared Salmon with Lentils
meals.instructions: Cook lentils by simmering 18–20 minutes. Toss asparagus with a bit of olive oil and roast at 200C/400F for 12 minutes. Pat salmon dry, season with salt and pepper, and sear in olive oil skin-down 3 minutes, then flip for 2–3 minutes. Mix mustard and lemon for a dressing. Plate: lentils, salmon, asparagus, dill, flaxseed, and dressing.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Indian Chicken & Chickpea Masala
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with garam masala and turmeric. Sear in coconut oil 5 minutes, then remove. Saute onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, and remaining spices. Add chickpeas, tomato, and 40ml water — simmer 10 minutes. Return chicken and stir in spinach. Serve over cauliflower rice with flaxseed and lemon juice.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Energy Balls (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Mash the date in a small bowl until paste-like. Add protein powder, cocoa powder, and almond butter — mix until combined. Roll into 2–3 small balls and coat in coconut flakes. Refrigerate 10 minutes to firm, or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Blueberry & Almond Butter Baked Oats (Topping B, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Pour into a greased ramekin, press blueberries into the top, and bake 25–30 minutes. Top with almond butter.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Polish-Style Chicken & Turkey Scramble
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil and saute onion, pepper, and mushrooms 4 minutes. Add diced chicken breast and cook 5 minutes. Add sliced turkey sausage and cook 2 minutes. Whisk egg and egg whites, pour into skillet and scramble gently. Add sauerkraut and caraway. Warm black beans on the side. Top with dill and flaxseed.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Portuguese Garlic Shrimp (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil and butter, add garlic slices and cook 1 minute until fragrant. Add shrimp, paprika, pepper flakes — sear 2 minutes per side. Add lemon juice and let reduce 1 minute. Separately, warm white beans and saute kale 3–4 minutes. Plate beans and kale, top with garlic shrimp and pan sauce, flaxseed, and parsley.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Date & Nut Butter Bites (Phase 2)

ingredients.name: Whey isolate vanilla protein powder (in filling)

meals.instructions: Slice dates lengthwise. Mix almond butter with protein powder into a thick paste. Stuff each date with the filling and press closed. Roll in a mixture of cocoa powder and coconut flakes. Refrigerate 10 minutes or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Pumpkin & Pecan Baked Oats (Topping E, Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350F. Mash banana, whisk in egg, add protein powder, almond milk, vanilla, and cinnamon. Fold in oats, chia seeds, and baking powder. Spread pumpkin puree on top in a greased ramekin and bake 25–30 minutes. Top with pecans and honey drizzle.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Greek Chicken & Lentil Soup (Fakes)
meals.instructions: Dice chicken and season with oregano and salt. Sear in olive oil 5 minutes, then remove. Saute onion, carrot, and celery 4 minutes. Add garlic for 1 minute. Add lentils, broth, tomato, and bay leaf — boil, reduce, and simmer 20 minutes. Return chicken for the last 5 minutes. Remove bay leaf, finish with lemon juice and flaxseed.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Canadian Maple-Glazed Turkey with Roast Vegetables
meals.instructions: Make glaze by mixing maple syrup, mustard, vinegar, garlic, and thyme. Season turkey with salt and pepper, sear in olive oil 3 minutes per side. Brush with glaze and bake at 200C/400F for 15–18 minutes. Toss root vegetables and green beans with a bit of olive oil and roast alongside. Plate sliced turkey with roasted vegetables, flaxseed, and remaining glaze drizzled on top.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Brownie Bites (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Mix protein powder and cocoa in a bowl. Add mashed banana, melted coconut oil, honey, vanilla, and salt — stir into a thick dough. Roll into 2–3 balls. Refrigerate 15 minutes or eat immediately.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

meals.label: BREAKFAST
meals.name: Veggie Omelet with Turkey Sausage & Black Beans (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Heat olive oil, saute onion and bell pepper 3–4 minutes, add spinach until wilted. Add sliced turkey sausage and heat 2 minutes. Whisk egg whites and egg, pour over vegetables and cook as omelet or scramble. Serve with warmed black beans, salsa, avocado, and flaxseed.

meals.label: LUNCH
meals.name: Peruvian Aji de Gallina-Inspired
meals.instructions: Poach or bake chicken, then shred. Saute onion in olive oil 3 minutes, add garlic, aji amarillo, cumin, and turmeric for 1 minute. Blend coconut milk until smooth to make a cream sauce. Add sauce and shredded chicken to the pan, simmer 5 minutes. Steam cauliflower. Serve: cauliflower, aji de gallina sauce over chicken, half hard-boiled egg, flaxseed, and a squeeze of lemon juice.

meals.label: DINNER
meals.name: Taiwanese Three-Cup Chicken (San Bei Ji)
meals.instructions: Cut chicken into bite-size pieces. Heat sesame oil until very hot and sear chicken 4 minutes per side until crispy. Add garlic and ginger for 1 minute. Add coconut aminos, vinegar, and honey — simmer 5 minutes until sauce reduces and glazes the chicken. Add Thai basil and chili, toss 30 seconds. Steam bok choy and edamame. Bowl: cauliflower rice, three-cup chicken, bok choy, edamame, flaxseed, and chia seeds.

meals.label: TREAT
meals.name: Protein Banana Nice Cream (Phase 2)
meals.instructions: Blend frozen banana slices with protein powder in a food processor until smooth. Add cocoa powder, honey, and vanilla — blend until combined. Eat immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 20 minutes for firmer consistency.

days.adrenalNote: Includes 2 adrenal cocktails + bone broth (248 cal / 28g protein)

groceryLists.title: Week 1 — Days 1–7
groceryLists.subtitle: Phase 1 · 2 meals + 1 treat per day

items.text: Chicken breast (boneless, skinless) — 770g raw (~4 medium breasts)
Turkey sausage, GF pre-cooked — 156g (~1 pack / 5–6 links)
Unsweetened almond milk — 1 small carton (~135g needed)
Thai basil — 1 small bunch (or buy fresh, freeze remainder)
Black beans — 2 cans (15 oz each; ~475g drained)
Chicken broth (low sodium) — 1 small carton (120ml needed)
Kalamata olives — 1 small jar (8g for D4)
Whey isolate vanilla protein powder — 1 large tub (2 lb min)
GF oat flour — 1 small bag (or grind GF oats)
PB fit powdered peanut butter — 1 bag
Collagen peptides (unflavored) — 1 large bag (16 oz min)
Thai basil (fresh) — 1 large bunch (use D6, freeze rest)
Fresh red chilies — 1 small bag (freeze individually)
Gochujang (GF Korean chili paste) — 1 small jar
Cumin (ground or whole seeds) — 1 larger bag
Corn tortillas (GF, street taco size) — 2–3 packs (freeze extras)
Coconut water — bulk buy ~14L for full month
Hot sauce (Cholula or similar, GF) — 1–2 bottles

groceryLists.dailyNote: Daily Fixed Items (every day) 2 adrenal cocktails: 2 cups coconut water · 2 tbsp coconut milk · 4 tbsp orange juice (~1 orange) · ½ tsp salt · ¼ tsp cream of tartar · 2 scoops collagen peptides (~30g) | 1 cup bone broth

items.text: Lean ground turkey breast (99% lean) — 320g (~12 oz)
Turkey sausage, GF (pre-cooked) — 55g (use from Week 1 pack)
Chickpeas — 1 can (100g drained; D9 chana masala)
Tomato sauce (no sugar added) — 1 small can (130g)
Chicken broth — 80g (use open carton from Week 1)

Restock Check Whey protein ~285g · GF oats 205g · Ground flaxseed ~74g · Chia seeds ~43g · PB fit powder 30g · Walnuts 10g · Buckwheat flour 20g · Medjool dates 35g (~3 dates) · Collagen peptides 210g · Bone broth 1.7L · Dried green/brown lentils 70g

groceryLists.title: Week 3 — Days 15–21
groceryLists.subtitle: Phase 1 → Phase 2 Transition · 2 meals + 1 treat per day

items.text: Lamb leg, lean (raw) — 135g (~5 oz; D15 kebab)
Lean ground turkey breast (99% lean) — 160g (~6 oz; D17 Taiwanese)
Pigeon peas / gandules — 1 can (90g drained; D16 Dominican)
Black-eyed peas — 1 can (70g drained; D21 BBQ)
Tomato paste — 1 small can / tube (10g; D16)
Pumpkin puree (canned, pure) — 1 can (75g; D20 oats E)
Salsa — use existing jar (40g for D19)

Restock Check Whey protein ~187g · GF oats 150g · Ground flaxseed ~91g · Chia seeds ~29g · PB fit powder 20g · Butter 5g (D20 shrimp) · Dried green/brown lentils 55g (D18 French soup) + 50g (D15 kebab pilaf) · Medjool dates 16g (~1–2 dates; D21 date bites) · Collagen peptides 210g · Bone broth 1.7L
Lean ground turkey breast (99% lean) — 140g (~5 oz; D26 Korean)

Restock Check Whey protein ~185g · GF oats 150g · GF oat flour 31g · Buckwheat flour 12g · Ground flaxseed ~120g · Chia seeds ~39g · Tahini 12g (D24 oats C Ph2) · Sunflower seed butter 10g (D26 oats D Ph2) · Almond butter 17g · Peanut butter 15g · Medjool dates 24g (~2 dates) · Collagen peptides 210g · Bone broth 1.7L

groceryLists.title: Week 5 — Days 29–30
groceryLists.subtitle: Phase 2 · Final 2 days — small quantities only

items.text: Parsnip — 1 small (40g; D29 Canadian — or sub extra carrot)
Thai basil — use frozen from Week 1 trip (D30 Taiwanese)
Turkey sausage, GF (pre-cooked) — 35g (D30 omelet; use open pack)
Coconut milk (full-fat) — 20g (D30 Peruvian; use from open can)

Restock Check Whey protein ~41g · GF oats 30g · Ground flaxseed ~31g · Maple syrup 8g (D29 Canadian glaze) · Pumpkin puree 50g (D29 oats E; use from open can) · Collagen peptides 60g · Bone broth 480ml

howToUse.title: How to Use This Guide
howToUse.intro: This plan is designed to work with your body's natural hormonal rhythm, not against it. It follows the framework popularized by Dr. Mindy Pelz in her work on fasting and the female cycle.
howToUse.startingDescription: Day 1 = the first day of your period. Figure out approximately where you are in your cycle right now and start on that day. For example, if you're on day 14 of your cycle, start at Day 14 in this plan. Then, when your next period begins, restart the plan from Day 1. From that point on, you'll be fully synced.

phases.label: Phase 1 · Days 1–20
phases.title: Standard Phase
phases.description: During menstruation and the follicular phase, your body responds really well to intermittent fasting. Your estrogen is rising, insulin sensitivity is higher, and your metabolism is running efficiently. You're in your fat-burning sweet spot. You'll eat 2 meals + 1 snack + 2 adrenal cocktails per day, keeping your eating window to roughly 8 hours.

phases.label: Phase 2 · Days 21–30
phases.title: Luteal Phase
phases.description: As progesterone rises in the second half of your cycle, so does your hunger — and that's completely normal. Your body is preparing for the possibility of pregnancy and needs more consistent fuel. Fighting this hunger leads to cravings, bingeing, and falling off track. Instead, we lean into it: you'll eat 3 meals + 1 snack + 2 adrenal cocktails per day. More frequent eating keeps blood sugar stable and progesterone supported.

howToUse.callout: Most diet plans ignore your cycle entirely — which is why so many women feel like they "fail" every month around the same time. You're not failing. You're fighting your biology. This plan works with it instead.

adrenalCocktail.title: Your Adrenal Cocktail
adrenalCocktail.intro: You'll see two adrenal cocktails built into every day of this plan. Here's everything you need to know about what they are, why they matter, and how to make them.

sections.heading: What Is It?
sections.text: A simple, nourishing drink designed to support your adrenal glands — the tiny powerhouses responsible for your stress response, energy levels, and hormonal balance.

sections.heading: Why It Matters
sections.text: When you're in a caloric deficit, your body can interpret the reduced food intake as a form of stress. Your adrenal glands may start working overtime, which can lead to fatigue, cravings, and hormonal disruption. The adrenal cocktail provides a targeted blend of minerals and nutrients to keep them supported so that doesn't happen.

sections.heading: When to Drink It
sections.text: One at 10:00 AM and one at 2:00 PM. These are the times your cortisol naturally dips during the day — and the cocktail helps smooth out those energy valleys so you don't hit a wall.

adrenalCocktailRecipe.title: Adrenal Cocktail Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp freshly squeezed orange juice (about half an orange)
adrenalCocktailRecipe.totals: ~160 cal · 4g protein per cocktail · 2 per day = 320 cal / 8g protein total
adrenalCocktailRecipe.note: Already included in your daily calorie and protein totals.

supplyEstimates.title: 30-Day Supply Estimates
supplyEstimates.subtitle: Buy these in bulk at the start of the plan — they are consumed every week

phaseDividers.label: Phase 1
phaseDividers.title: Standard Phase
phaseDividers.detail: During this phase, intermittent fasting supports your body.Keep your eating window to roughly 8 hours.

phaseDividers.label: Phase 2
phaseDividers.title: Luteal Phase
phaseDividers.detail: More frequent eating supports progesterone and blood sugar stability.No more intermittent fasting — eat throughout the day.

whatsNext.title: What's Next
whatsNext.intro: You did it. Thirty days of eating with intention, nourishing your body through every phase of your cycle. That's not a small thing.

options.title: Option 1: Repeat the plan.
options.description: If you're still working toward your fat loss goals, you can run through the plan again starting on Day 1 of your next period. Your body already knows the rhythm, so the second round is easier.

options.title: Option 2: Transition to maintenance.
options.description: If you've reached your goal or you're ready for a break from the deficit, go back to your TDEE calculator and eat at your maintenance calories. Keep the high-protein, high-fiber foundation. Just increase portions. Your body will thank you.

options.title: Option 3: Use this as a template.
options.description: You now know what balanced, cycle-synced meals look like. Use the structure, not the phase-perfect rules. The protein target, the adrenal cocktails, and the overall building blocks can carry you forward.

whatsNext.closingNote: Whatever you choose, remember this plan was never about perfection. It was about working with your body instead of against it. Keep doing that.
